# LLM Capsule — llms.txt

> LLM Capsule is an AI enablement data layer and plugin for enterprise. It enables organizations to use any LLM on sensitive documents without exposing original data — through local encapsulation, structure-preserving processing, and local restoration.

## Company
- Brand: LLM Capsule (by CUBIG)
- Domain: llmcapsule.ai
- Category: Enterprise AI Data Security / AI Enablement

## Core Capabilities (3+2 Architecture)
- **Zero Exposure**: Sensitive data is encapsulated locally before leaving the enterprise environment. Raw data never reaches external AI services.
- **Restoration**: AI outputs are auto-restored locally with original enterprise data — producing usable results, not redacted placeholders.
- **Enterprise Context Control**: Organizations define their own sensitivity rules beyond standard PII — project names, contract references, financial terms, strategic data.
- **Structure-Preserving Processing** (+1): Document layout, table schemas, entity relationships, and cross-references remain intact during encapsulation.
- **Cross-Model Execution** (+2): Model-agnostic — works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, or any LLM API without vendor lock-in.

## Pages

### Main
- [Home](https://llmcapsule.ai/): AI enablement data layer for sensitive enterprise documents. Define your own confidentiality rules, process with any LLM, restore outputs.
- [Product](https://llmcapsule.ai/product): Five core capabilities — zero exposure, restoration, enterprise context control, structure-preserving processing, and cross-model execution.
- [Architecture](https://llmcapsule.ai/architecture): Local encapsulation, cross-model execution, and restoration. On-premise, air-gapped, cloud, and hybrid deployment models.
- [Solutions](https://llmcapsule.ai/solutions): AI enablement across public sector, finance, healthcare, legal, and telecom industries.
- [Pricing](https://llmcapsule.ai/pricing): Proof of Value, annual enterprise license, and AWS Marketplace options.
- [Trust & Compliance](https://llmcapsule.ai/trust): ISO 27001, ISO 42001, GS Certification. Enterprise-grade security with full audit trail.
- [Trust Center](https://llmcapsule.ai/trust-center): Security certifications, compliance documentation, and data handling principles.
- [Downloads](https://llmcapsule.ai/downloads): Architecture briefs, product overviews, and integration guides.
- [Resources](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources): Technical documentation, learning resources, glossary, and trust information.
- [Request Proof of Value](https://llmcapsule.ai/request-pov): Test LLM Capsule with your own enterprise documents.

### Learn Hub
- [Secure Enterprise AI Data Workflows](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/secure-enterprise-ai-data-workflows): End-to-end operating model for protecting sensitive data across AI workflows while restoring usable outputs.
- [Secure Enterprise AI Workflows](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/secure-enterprise-ai-workflows): Business-specific sensitivity controls across the AI pipeline.
- [Enterprise AI Data Protection](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/enterprise-ai-data-protection): Comprehensive guide to enabling AI on enterprise data with zero exposure.
- [Enterprise AI Document Processing](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/enterprise-ai-document-processing): Secure document intelligence with structure preservation and local restoration.
- [AI Data Pipeline Protection](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/ai-data-pipeline-protection): Enabling enterprise AI at every stage — ingestion, encapsulation, processing, restoration, and delivery.
- [How to Use AI on Sensitive Enterprise Data](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/how-to-use-ai-on-sensitive-enterprise-data): Practical guide to using LLMs on sensitive data without exposing documents.
- [Why Redaction Breaks Enterprise AI Workflows](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/why-redaction-breaks-enterprise-ai-workflows): Why masking and redaction tools fail in AI workflows, and what replaces them.
- [Structure-Preserving Document Processing](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/structure-preserving-document-processing): Maintaining document layout and entity relationships during AI enablement.
- [On-Premise vs Cloud AI Data Protection](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/on-premise-vs-cloud-ai-data-protection): Comparing deployment models — on-premise, air-gapped, cloud, and hybrid.
- [PII Protection vs Enterprise Confidentiality Control](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/pii-protection-vs-enterprise-confidentiality-control): Beyond personal data — protecting trade secrets, deal terms, and strategic data.

### Comparisons
- [LLM Capsule vs Masking Tools](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/llm-capsule-vs-masking-tools): Masking applies generic PII rules. Capsule lets you define business-specific sensitivity and restores outputs.
- [LLM Capsule vs Prompt Security Gateways](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/llm-capsule-vs-prompt-security-gateways): Gateways filter at the API layer. Capsule enables AI at the data layer with encapsulation and restoration.
- [LLM Capsule vs Synthetic Data Platforms](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/learn/llm-capsule-vs-synthetic-data-platforms): Synthetic data replaces real data. Capsule preserves and restores real enterprise data after AI processing.

### Glossary
- [What Is an AI Data Capsule?](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/glossary/what-is-ai-data-capsule): Encapsulates sensitive data before AI processing and restores it after.
- [Zero Exposure](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/glossary/zero-exposure): Original sensitive data never leaves the enterprise environment during AI processing.
- [Restoration](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/glossary/restoration): Restoring AI outputs to original enterprise context using locally stored mappings.
- [Restorable Workflow](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/glossary/restorable-workflow): AI processing pattern with reversible data protection.
- [Secure LLM Usage](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/glossary/secure-llm-usage): Using large language models without data exposure.
- [Enterprise Context Control](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/glossary/enterprise-context-control): Policy-based sensitivity classification beyond standard PII.
- [Structure-Preserving Processing](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/glossary/structure-preserving-processing): Maintaining document integrity during data protection.
- [Structure-Preserving Processing vs Flat Masking](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/glossary/structure-preserving-processing-vs-flat-masking): Flat masking collapses structure. Structure preservation maintains document integrity.
- [Local Restoration vs Anonymization](https://llmcapsule.ai/resources/glossary/local-restorationvs-anonymization): Anonymization is permanent. Restoration automatically restores real enterprise data after AI processing.

## Deployment Options
- On-premise (customer-controlled infrastructure)
- Air-gapped environments
- Cloud & AWS Marketplace (VPC deployment)
- Hybrid & embedded

## Certifications
- ISO 27001 (Information Security Management)
- ISO 42001 (AI Management System)
- GS Certification (Good Software)
